trigger: Fire alarm activated in building above 20 floors with confirmed smoke detection on multiple floors
action: Initiate vertical evacuation protocol: activate building-wide audio guidance, prioritize assisted evacuation for floors above fire, deploy emergency lighting pheromones to stairwells, coordinate with fire department via somatic pheromone sharing of structural telemetry, establish ground-level triage zones

trigger: Crowd density exceeds 6 persons/m² in confined space with inward movement detected via visual pheromones
action: Deploy crowd dispersion pheromones to create flow vectors, activate calm-down audio frequencies in ambient sound, redirect pedestrian flow via dynamic signage, alert medical teams to standby positions, increase somatic monitoring of crowd vital signs

trigger: Weather service issues severe weather warning affecting >50,000 population with predicted displacement
action: Activate designated shelter facilities, coordinate transportation pheromones for vulnerable populations, distribute supply allocation signals, establish sanitation and medical facility pheromones, create family reunification protocol channels

trigger: Loss of >3 substations in interconnected grid with frequency dropping below 59.3Hz
action: Initiate load-shedding protocol via substation pheromones, prioritize critical infrastructure (hospitals, water treatment), communicate rolling blackout schedule to public, coordinate with neighboring grids for restoration assistance, monitor for cascading failure propagation

trigger: Sensor network detects abnormal turbidity or chemical readings at two or more water treatment facilities
action: Issue boil-water advisory via multi-channel alert, isolate affected water zones via valve control pheromones, deploy water testing teams to critical nodes, establish emergency water distribution points, monitor healthcare pheromones for gastrointestinal symptoms

trigger: Loss of >40% cellular tower coverage in metropolitan area for >15 minutes
action: Activate mesh network emergency protocols, prioritize emergency services communication channels, deploy temporary communication balloons/drones, inform public via broadcast media and sirens, coordinate with satellite providers for emergency bandwidth

trigger: Storm surge warning exceeds 3 feet above normal high tide with projected inundation zones mapped
action: Initiate phased evacuation of coastal zones, deploy flood barrier pheromones where applicable, establish evacuation routes and shelters, coordinate water rescue team deployment, monitor for contamination risks in flooded areas

trigger: Seismic sensors detect P-wave indicating >5.0 magnitude earthquake with S-wave arrival imminent
action: Trigger automated building safety protocols (gas shutoff, elevator halting), issue drop-cover-hold-on public alert, activate emergency services dispatch, initiate structural assessment pheromones for critical infrastructure, prepare for aftershock sequence

trigger: Heat index forecast >110°F for >2 consecutive days with humidity >60%
action: Activate cooling center network, increase outreach to vulnerable populations (elderly, isolated), coordinate water distribution points, adjust work hour advisories for outdoor workers, monitor healthcare pheromones for heat-related illness spikes

trigger: Blizzard warning issued with expected snowfall >24 inches and winds >35 mph
action: Activate snow emergency protocols, prioritize road clearing for emergency routes, establish warming centers, coordinate utility readiness for power outages, issue travel restrictions and shelter-in-place advisories as needed

trigger: Public health reports cluster of >10 linked cases with R0 >1.5 in metropolitan area
action: Initiate contact tracing pheromone network, establish testing sites and isolation facilities, deploy public information campaign via multiple channels, coordinate healthcare resource allocation, monitor for healthcare system strain indicators

trigger: Vaccine doses available for >70% of target population with cold chain validated
action: Deploy vaccination site pheromones based on population density and equity factors, coordinate appointment scheduling system, establish monitoring for adverse reactions, deploy mobile units to underserved areas, track herd immunity progress indicators

trigger: Emergency department wait times >6 hours with ambulance diversion active at >50% of facilities
action: Activate alternate care sites, deploy medical personnel pheromones to areas of greatest need, initiate telemedicine expansion protocols, coordinate with regional facilities for patient redistribution, monitor resource utilization pheromones

trigger: Train automatic braking system engaged with reported derailment and potential passenger injuries
action: Isolate track section via signaling pheromones, deploy emergency response teams to location, establish medical triage at safe distance, coordinate with transit authority for service suspension, initiate passenger information and family notification protocols

trigger: Chemical sensor network detects airborne contaminants exceeding IDLH levels along transportation corridor
action: Establish exclusion zone via geographic pheromones, deploy plume modeling to predict spread direction, activate shelter-in-place or evacuation orders based on wind direction, coordinate hazmat team deployment, monitor atmospheric conditions for changes

trigger: Rainfall rate >2 inches/hour in urban drainage basin with street flooding reported
action: Activate flood warning systems, deploy pumps to critical underpasses and tunnels, issue travel advisories for affected routes, coordinate with public works for drainage inspection, monitor for electrical hazards in flooded areas

trigger: Fire detected in high-rise building with flame spread vertical via facade or interior shafts
action: Activate floor-by-floor isolation protocols, pressurize stairwells to prevent smoke spread, initiate controlled evacuation of fire floor and adjacent floors, coordinate firefighting resources via pheromone network, prepare for potential full evacuation

trigger: Structural monitoring detects anomalous vibrations or displacements exceeding safety thresholds
action: Immediate load restriction via traffic control pheromones, deploy inspection teams to critical points, establish monitoring for progressive failure signs, prepare contingency routing for traffic, coordinate with engineering authorities for assessment

trigger: Carbon monoxide or particulate levels exceed safe limits in transportation tunnel with limited ventilation capacity
action: Activate emergency ventilation systems, restrict traffic flow and prohibit certain vehicle types, issue air quality advisories for tunnel users, deploy monitoring teams to assess conditions, prepare for potential tunnel closure if levels persist

trigger: Multiple critical infrastructure systems report unauthorized access attempts or anomalous behavior patterns
action: Isolate affected systems via network segmentation pheromones, initiate forensic analysis protocols, coordinate with cybersecurity authorities, maintain essential services through manual fallbacks, monitor for lateral movement indicators

trigger: Water pressure drops >40% in distribution zone with surface flooding reported and potential contamination risk
action: Isolate affected pipeline segment via valve control pheromones, issue boil-water advisory for downstream areas, deploy repair crews with appropriate traffic control, establish temporary water distribution points, monitor for service restoration progress

trigger: Gas sensor network detects methane concentrations >1% in enclosed or confined spaces
action: Evacuate immediate area and establish exclusion zone, eliminate ignition sources in vicinity, ventilate area using natural and forced air flow, coordinate with utility for source identification and repair, monitor for gas dispersion and accumulation patterns

trigger: Loss of primary and backup satellite links for >30 minutes affecting wide-area coordination
action: Activate terrestrial backup communication protocols, prioritize line-of-sight and radio frequency alternatives, coordinate with regional nodes for message relay, decrease non-essential bandwidth usage, monitor for restoration indicators

trigger: WHO or CDC changes pandemic phase designation indicating increased geographic spread
action: Review and update response protocols based on new phase guidance, adjust resource allocation pheromones, enhance public communication frequency, coordinate with international partners for information sharing, prepare healthcare system for potential patient load changes

trigger: Healthcare facility reports PPE burnout rate >25% or infection rate among staff >5%
action: Activate PPE conservation and reuse protocols where safe, deploy additional staffing pheromones to affected facilities, coordinate supply chain for critical protective equipment, implement enhanced infection control measures, monitor staff well-being indicators

trigger: Critical medical supplies (oxygen, medications, IV fluids) projected to fall below 3-day supply at >30% of facilities
action: Activate alternative sourcing protocols, coordinate with national stockpile for emergency allocation, implement conservation measures for non-critical usage, identify therapeutic alternatives where appropriate, monitor supply chain restoration indicators

trigger: Multiple credible threats or actual violence incidents reported at large public gathering
action: Activate enhanced security pheromone deployment, coordinate with law enforcement for threat assessment, establish medical casualty collection points, implement bag screening and access control enhancements, prepare for potential evacuation or shelter-in-place

trigger: Credible report of active shooter with potential ongoing threat in confined or populated area
action: Issue immediate shelter-in-place or evacuation guidance based on circumstances, activate law enforcement response pheromones, establish communication channels for real-time updates, prepare medical response for potential casualties, maintain situational awareness via all available sensors

trigger: Credible threat of explosive device reported with potential location information
action: Establish exclusion zone based on device type and location, evacuate area within calculated blast radius, coordinate with bomb squad for investigation and neutralization, maintain exclusion zone until device rendered safe, investigate threat credibility and source

trigger: Detection of chemical, biological, radiological, or nuclear agents above safety thresholds
action: Establish hot/warm/cold zones via geographic pheromones, activate appropriate detection and identification protocols, coordinate with specialized response teams, establish decontamination corridors, monitor for agent persistence and spread

trigger: Radiation monitoring detects elevated levels outside normal operating parameters at nuclear facility
action: Activate plant emergency protocols, coordinate with nuclear regulatory authorities, establish monitoring for off-site radiation dispersion, prepare for potential protective actions for surrounding populations, maintain transparency in public communication

trigger: Structural monitoring of dam indicates progressive failure with potential for uncontrolled release
action: Initiate evacuation of downstream areas based on inundation mapping, coordinate with emergency services for rescue preparation, monitor structural parameters for progression, prepare for potential controlled release to prevent catastrophic failure, notify relevant authorities immediately

trigger: Water levels exceed levee design height with observable seepage or boils developing
action: Activate levee monitoring and patrol protocols, prepare for potential evacuation of protected areas, coordinate with engineering authorities for assessment, implement emergency strengthening measures where feasible, monitor for progressive failure indicators

trigger: Volcanic ash advisory issued affecting flight paths or ground transportation with projected accumulation
action: Issue travel advisories for affected areas, coordinate with aviation authorities for flight restrictions, establish cleaning protocols for critical infrastructure, monitor respiratory health indicators in exposed populations, prepare for potential ash accumulation impacts

trigger: Wildfire approaches within 5 miles of urban interface with red flag weather conditions present
action: Issue evacuation warnings for at-risk areas, prepare structure protection resources, coordinate with firefighting agencies for resource allocation, establish shelter locations for displaced residents, monitor fire progression and weather conditions

trigger: Blizzard conditions expected with visibility <1/4 mile and winds >35 mph for >3 hours
action: Issue travel bans for non-essential vehicles, activate snow emergency routes for essential services, establish warming centers and shelter locations, coordinate utility preparedness for power outages, monitor for cold-related health indicators

trigger: Ice accumulation >0.25 inches expected on surfaces with potential for widespread power outages
action: Issue travel advisories and potential restrictions, activate tree trimming and line clearing crews preemptively, coordinate utility preparedness for outage response, establish warming centers for vulnerable populations, monitor for downed power line hazards

trigger: National Weather Service issues tornado warning for populated area with confirmed rotation detected
action: Issue immediate take-cover instructions via all available channels, activate emergency services for post-event response, establish shelter locations in sturdy structures, monitor for multiple vortex reports, maintain situational awareness for storm progression

trigger: Severe thunderstorm warning issued with downburst potential indicating straight-line winds >70 mph
action: Issue shelter-in-place advisories for mobile and temporary structures, secure loose objects and outdoor equipment, prepare for potential power outages and flooding, monitor for rapid storm evolution, coordinate post-storm assessment teams

trigger: Flash flood watch issued with heavy rainfall expected in steep terrain or urban areas with poor drainage
action: Issue travel advisories for flood-prone areas, monitor stream gauges and rainfall rates, prepare emergency response teams for deployment, establish evacuation routes to higher ground, monitor for rapid water level increases

trigger: Urban temperature exceeds rural surroundings by >15°F with heat index >105°F affecting vulnerable populations
action: Activate cooling center network with extended hours, increase outreach to isolated elderly and homeless populations, coordinate water distribution and misting stations, adjust work schedules for outdoor workers, monitor heat-related illness indicators in real-time

trigger: Multiple substations report physical intrusion or equipment tampering with potential for coordinated attack
action: Increase security posture at all critical facilities, coordinate with law enforcement for threat assessment, prepare for potential grid isolation procedures, monitor for cascading failure indicators, maintain essential load priority protocols

trigger: Logistics or transportation management systems report ransomware or unauthorized access affecting delivery schedules
action: Isolate affected systems while maintaining critical operations via manual procedures, coordinate with authorities for investigation and recovery, activate alternative routing pheromones, monitor for spoilage or degradation of time-sensitive goods, prepare for manual override procedures

trigger: Major food distribution center reports operational shutdown affecting >30% of regional supply

trigger: Veterinary authorities report confirmed cases of reportable animal disease with potential for zoonotic transmission

trigger: Combined sewer overflow events exceed treatment plant capacity with discharge to waterways reported

trigger: Marine vessel reports loss of steerage or power with potential to strike bridge structure

trigger: Train consist carrying hazardous materials reports breach of containment with potential environmental impact

trigger: Pipeline monitoring detects pressure drop or hydrocarbon release with potential for ignition or environmental impact

trigger: Industrial facility reports internal emergency with potential for off-site impact including chemical release or fire

trigger: Mine reports ventilation failure, ingress of water, or potential entrapment of personnel

trigger: Wildfire exceeds 10,000 acres with extreme fire behavior and potential for rapid spread

trigger: Offshore oil or gas platform reports emergency situation with potential for evacuation or environmental release

trigger: NOAA issues geomagnetic storm warning with potential for power grid and satellite impacts

trigger: Solar flare causes sudden ionospheric disturbance affecting HF radio communications and navigation systems

trigger: Arctic research station reports life-threatening situation with potential for personnel endangerment or facility loss

trigger: Quantum key distribution or quantum communication link reports failure with potential for security degradation

trigger: Biocontainment facility reports potential release of genetically modified organisms with unknown ecological effects
action: Activate containment breach protocols and coordinate with specialized response teams, establish monitoring for potential organism persistence and spread, prepare for potential eradication or control efforts, monitor for potential horizontal gene transfer effects, maintain precautionary approach until better characterized

trigger: Solar storm induces geomagnetic currents in power grid with potential for transformer damage or voltage instability
action: Activate grid operator procedures for geomagnetic storm mitigation, prepare for potential transformer heating and harmonic distortion, monitor for potential voltage instability and protective relay operations, coordinate with neighboring grids for mutual assistance, prepare for potential load shedding or grid isolation
